business.name: Usman Builders & Plumbers
business.tagline: Your Trusted Local Building & Plumbing Experts

contact.address: 612 Coventry Rd, Small Heath, Birmingham B10 0UT

sample_reviews.author: Tariq M
sample_reviews.text: Great local merchant — always have the parts I need in stock. Staff are very helpful and prices are fair. Will keep coming back.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah B
sample_reviews.text: Handy place on Coventry Road for trade supplies. Quick service and friendly team. Sorted my plumbing emergency the same day.

sample_reviews.author: Imran K
sample_reviews.text: Really reliable builders and plumbers. Usman's team did a fantastic job on our bathroom renovation — neat work and on time.

brand.usp: Based in the heart of Small Heath, Usman Builders & Plumbers combines a well-stocked trade counter with skilled on-site building and plumbing services — giving you a one-stop solution for all your property needs.
brand.about_paragraph: We are Usman Builders & Plumbers, proudly serving Small Heath and the wider Birmingham community from our Coventry Road base. Whether you need trade supplies, a full bathroom renovation, or an emergency plumbing call-out, our experienced team is here to help. We take pride in delivering honest, reliable service at competitive prices to both homeowners and trade professionals.
